svg.title: kollab internal architecture — validated against source
svg.desc: System architecture showing ACE orchestration layer coordinating Claude Code and Codex agents, with WebSocket transport to the browser UI, prompts module, and JSONL event logging.

g.text: index.html · app.js · style.css · Tailwind CDN · about.html
HTTP + WebSocket · session lifecycle · config API · history · export · /about
Session state machine · turn orchestration · verdict parsing · convergence detection
TranscriptLog — transcript.py · JSONL append per event · session_id stamped · flush on every write

svg.text: * Codex MCP params accepted in constructor but no-op — codex exec CLI has no --mcp-server flag
* Single global WS /ws — not per-session; all connected clients receive all session broadcasts
